title: Zstd overlap path passes aliased JS buffers into compression refs
unsafe_operation: byte_slice / byte_slice_mut -> CompressionContext::set_buffers(Option<&[u8]>, Option<&mut [u8]>) -> NativeZstd FFI buffer handoff
invariant: Compression input &[u8] and output &mut [u8] must not alias the same caller-controlled JS backing storage
safe_caller: zlib Zstd _processChunk / _handle.writeSync with caller-controlled overlapping ArrayBuffer input and output

stable_byte.source: Overlapping caller-controlled ArrayBuffer input and output
stable_byte.hazard: Native Zstd compression can read and write aliased caller-controlled JS-backed buffers through Rust references without an established disjointness boundary
stable_byte.suggested_fix_boundary: Reject overlap or copy into stable disjoint storage before passing input and output buffers to native Zstd compression contexts
stable_byte.pr_aperture: Zstd _processChunk / _handle.writeSync overlap route only; do not rewrite unrelated zlib, brotli, public API routes, or zstd mode dispatch

fix_boundary: Reject overlap or copy into stable disjoint storage before passing input and output buffers to native Zstd compression contexts
pr_aperture: Zstd _processChunk / _handle.writeSync overlap route only; do not rewrite unrelated zlib, brotli, public API routes, or zstd mode dispatch
fix_options: Replace reference-based buffer passing with raw spans before calling native compression contexts
Add an explicit overlap policy before mutating compression state; reject overlap or copy into stable disjoint storage
If overlap is rejected on async paths, unpin both buffers before returning
do_not_touch: Do not rewrite unrelated zlib, brotli, or zstd mode dispatch
Do not claim a public API regression beyond the underscored/backcompat route without a public-route witness
Do not remove the manual/advisory marker or treat this as analyzer-discovered

evidence.summary: Manual route shows CompressionContext::set_buffers accepting input and output Rust references, with async and sync buffer construction sites feeding native Zstd contexts
evidence.limitation: source trace only; does not prove the safe JS route reaches this site or that the caller supplied overlapping buffers

evidence.summary: Bun debug witness produced deterministic wrong output for exact and shifted overlapping Zstd buffers while separate buffers matched expected output
evidence.limitation: runtime route evidence only; uses underscored/backcompat zlib internals and is not memory-safety proof

evidence.summary: Node 24 control matched the same overlap-output behavior for the constructed _processChunk / writeSync route
evidence.limitation: comparison witness only; does not make this a policy-ready compatibility claim

evidence.summary: Miri model isolates the reference-shaped aliasing pattern: the current &[u8] plus &mut [u8] shape trips Stacked Borrows, while the raw-span variant passes
evidence.limitation: model evidence only; does not prove the Bun site executed under Miri or that native compression behavior is memory-safe

trust_boundary: manual candidate; not analyzer-discovered; not proof of repository safety
